title: Uniface Glyphs
text: Uniface Glyphs Uniface delivers a set of glyphs for use in its own tools and editors. New glyphs are added in each new version of Uniface, sometimes replacing older glyphs, sometimes as additions. The following topics list many of the glyphs delivered with Uniface from Uniface 7, 8 and 9. Each topic lists the glyphs alphabetically by name. U9 Glyphs U8 Glyphs Glyphs U7: A-L Glyphs U7: M-Z Glyphs: u_*, ufs_*, and ugfp_* Uniface Glyphs by Subject Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
